question: NTC may grant the authorization to install and operate a repeater to whom?

choices.D: Only to duly recognized amateur associations, clubs or societies

question: A least how many licensed members must a club have, as one of the requirements, to be accredited by the NTC?

An amateur who is citizen or resident of a foreign country may be authorized to operate temporarily in the Philippines provided he is holder of a license issued  by their government and his country provides the same previlege to Filipino nationals. What do you call this partnership or arrangement on amateur licensing between two countries?
Which of the following is a ground for suspension/revocation of an amateur license?

choices.A: Intentional harmful interfering or jamming of legitimate licensed radio stations
choices.B: Engaging in amateur work without a valid license or performing  said work in behalf of a licensed amateur without proper authority
choices.C: Making any false statement in the application for license

question: To secure a class B amateur license, a registered Electronics and Communications Engineer shall be required to pass the examination for what element?
What element shall be required from a holder of a valid 1st/or 2nd class commercial radiotelegraph operator certificate to pass to secure a class B amateur license?
What is DW, DV or DU in the formation of amateur call sign?
For an amateur call sign DU1ABC, what is the suffix?
Which one below is a valid amateur call sign in the Philippines?
How much shall NTC fine any person who had been found to have violated the law with illegal possession and illegal transmission of an amateur transceiver?
How much shall NTC fine a firm, company, corporation or association found to have illegally purchased a base transceiver?
When shall an amateur make his station and documents available for NTC inspection?

choices.A: Any time upon request by an NTC representative or inspector with a Mission Order
choices.C: Anytime upon request by an official observer from the amateur community
choices.D: Upon release of the initial station license

question: In April 2011, NTC issued Memorandum Circular 04-03-2011 on some frequencies which shall be used at times of disasters and national emergencies. Which frequencies on 2m and 40m shall be used by amateurs as calling frequencies under this MC?
What is not among freqency bands allocated to the Amateur Radio Service?
What document is issued by NTC authorizing possession of a radio transmitter or receiver?
What is a document issued by NTC authorizing the holder to purchase a radio transmitter or transceivers.
What is required if a person wants to sell or transfer his transmitter or transceiver to another on a single transaction?

choices.A: He must obtain a permit to own or possess a transmitter or transceiver from the NTC.
choices.B: He must obtain a dealer's permit from the NTC.
choices.C: He must obtain a permit to sell or transfer from the NTC.
choices.D: He must provide the next owner a photocopy of his radio station license.

question: What is the federation of national amateur radio societies worldwide which serves as the watchdog and spokesperson for the world Amateur Radio community in the international level, wherein the Philippines is under its Region 3?
What size of the call sign characters of the fixed amateur radio station shall be posted at the entrance to the premises?
What size of the call sign characters shall be posted on the windshield of a vehicle or vessel of a mobile station?
